eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Maricopa, AZ; at 6:35 PM on MAY 25, 2026 Effective until 4:35 AM MAY 26, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: A SAFE Alert has been issued for Mesa Police Department. This is the Arizona Department of Public Safety. The Mesa Police Department is looking for a white male, Gregory Goodman, 68-years-old, approximately 5 feet 8 inches tall and weighing 145 pounds, with brown hair and green eyes. He was last seen wearing a black jacket over a white T-shirt and black shorts. Gregory is also missing a front tooth. Mr. Goodman was last seen on foot on May 25th, 2026, at approximately 9:00 am in the area of Sossaman and Baseline Road in the city of Mesa, Maricopa County. If you have contact with this SAFE Alert, please call 911. Monitor TV and Radio for updates.
